title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
